title: payment_watcher stream timeout 30s hardcoded; not tunable for Tor deployments
description: payment_watcher.rs tokio::time::timeout(Duration::from_secs(30)) per block is hardcoded. Over Tor or slow lightwalletd this causes spurious 'timed out after 30s' warnings and 60s reconnect delays on each scan cycle. Not tunable without code change. Recurring operator issue reports for valid deployments.
